## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Public API changes are exported through `openauc/api.py`
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
- [ ] Respects the scientific and licensing boundaries in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
      (independent implementation, no fabricated format rules, no silent
      inference, honest claims, synthetic test data)
